generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how outdated security laws put us at risk. The 2024 Domestic Security Act modernization gives agencies the tools they need to stop threats before they happen. Critics claim it's about surveillance, but in reality, it's about giving professionals the flexibility to protect all Americans. We can't afford to tie our hands with 20th-century regulations while threats evolve daily. #ModernSecurity #NationalSafetyFirst
